_comment: Forces Node to treat everything under public/wasm/ (Emscripten's non-ES6 MODULARIZE output) as CommonJS, overriding the repo root package.json's "type": "module". Needed so Node's worker_threads.Worker can load slicer-mt.js directly by real file path when Emscripten spawns pthread workers (see orca-wasm/scripts/smoke-test.mjs's loadModule() and mainScriptUrlOrBlob comment) — without this, Node parses the file as ESM and its unconditional require('worker_threads') throws ReferenceError.
